name: trends-aggregator
title: Trends Aggregator - Google Reddit HN GitHub Product Hunt
description: Free Exploding Topics & BuzzSumo alternative. Aggregate trending topics from 5 sources in one run: Google Trends (daily searches + traffic volume + region filtering), Hacker News (top tech stories), Reddit (r/popular), GitHub (trending repos), Product Hunt (top launches). Structured JSON/CSV output. Schedule daily/hourly. No API keys. Ideal for content marketing, SEO trend-jacking, competitive intelligence, newsletter curation. From $0.01/run.
